channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mississippi’s Black Voters Brace for Elections Ruling That Could Gut Supreme Court Clout
item.description: Black Mississippians won a Voting Rights Act case that challenges how the state elects supreme court justices. But that victory may be in jeopardy.

item.title: Long-Term Health Risks of Alcohol
6 Yoga Poses That May Support Liver Health
New YA Comics and Nonfiction for February 2026
item.description: If you love romantic comics, the new YA releases from February will be your jam. Check out this month's new YA nonfiction and comic releases.

item.title: Could Drinking Coffee Affect Your Cholesterol?
item.description: Coffee is often praised for its health benefits. But research suggests it may also affect cholesterol levels. Here’s what to know about the connection...

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.title: Everything We Know About Murderbot Season 2—and More SFF Links
item.description: In today's round-up of recent sci-fi and fantasy links, I have Murderbot S2 news, an interview with Mike Chen, and more!

item.title: The Rise of Girls’ Love Across Asia (Plus a Bonus for All Access Members)
item.description: Girls' Love media of all kinds is rising in popularity across Japan, China, Thailand, South Korea, and more.

item.title: One-Pan Irish Chicken
item.description: This Irish chicken is my cozy mashup of pub vibes and weeknight reality. Seared chicken thighs baked over bacon, cabbage,…

item.title: What Happened to TV and Movie Novelizations?
item.description: In the 60s and 70s, hundreds of TV and movie novelizations were published every year. What was the appeal, and why are so few published now?

item.title: Crack Chicken Orzo
item.description: This crack chicken orzo bake is creamy, cheesy, and packed with that irresistible ranch, bacon, and cheddar “crack” flavor everyone…

item.title: Butter Yellow Head to Toe

item.title: Beating by Guards, Not a Heart Attack, Killed Man in Mississippi Prison, Report Shows
item.description: FBI is now investigating after a report showed that Mississippi guards beat an incarcerated person to death.

item.title: Cheddar Bay Biscuit Bread
item.description: If you love my Red Lobster Cheddar Bay Biscuits, this Cheddar Bay Biscuit Bread has the same buttery, garlicky cheddar…

item.title: Challenges Await Mamdani as Hopes Rise for Closure of Notorious Rikers Island Jail Complex
item.description: For New York City’s mayor, the hard part isn’t deciding whether or not to shut down Rikers, but figuring out how to do it safely and in a timely way.

item.title: Spring Break Destinations for Families
item.description: Planning a family spring break trip can be challenging - especially if you're looking for somewhere warm, unique, and not overrun with other spring br...

item.title: Bang Bang Shrimp Pasta
item.description: Bang bang shrimp pasta is what weeknight dinner dreams are made of! Juicy shrimp, tender pasta, and that irresistible sweet-and-spicy…

item.title: Amazon Sundays: Effortless Lux Beauty
item.description: This week’s lineup reads like a tightly edited apothecary — micellar waters with cult followings, super hydrating creams known for… The post Amazon Su...

item.title: Copycat Starbucks Pink Drink
item.description: You guys, Starbucks sells the Strawberry Açaí concentrate in stores! Which means we can make the famous Starbuck’s Pink Drink…

item.title: ‘Alarmed’: What Happens When Juvenile Detention Centers Don’t Have Enough Staff
item.description: From California to New York, juvenile detention systems struggle to protect the youth they house.

item.title: In Prison, Optics Are Everything
item.description: Assumptions and rumors determine the social hierarchy and the wrong friendship can be dangerous.
